3:
Lamberteint joins you in the tavern shortly after you arrive, whereupon he shows you his original collection of the <Emphasis>On the Properties of Aspect Conversion</Emphasis> series, and then proceeds to settle in to wait for his students.

Much to the professor's disappointment, however, the pupils fail to arrive. Before dejectedly deciding to return to his chambers, he wonders aloud if something might have befallen them on their way. Scout the outskirts of Camp Drybone to see whether or not his fears are unfounded.

55:
So all three will attend the symposium... Excellent. I expected their replies sooner, but better late than never!
...Ah, pray excuse me. I've gotten ahead of myself.
